name: Madison Holdings Group Limited
summary: Madison Holdings Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the retail and wholesale of various wine products and other alcoholic beverages in the People's of Republic of China, Hong Kong, Europe, and Japan. It operates through Sales of Alcoholic Beverages, Financial Services, Blockchain Services, Loan Financing Services, and Auction segments. Its agency brands include Vega Sicilia, Roy Estate, Lail Vineyards, Amuse Bouche, and Bass Phillip. The company also offers wine storage services; financial consultancy services; securities and futures dealing services; loan financing, micro financing, and loan referral services; and alcoholic beverages auction services. In addition, it provides transaction verification and computing services. The company was formerly known as Madison Wine Holdings Limited and changed its name to Madison Holdings Group Limited in July 2017. Madison Holdings Group Limited was founded in 1997 and is based in Wong Chuk Hang, Hong Kong.
